title: Anchor: npm test
paragraphs: After the Cabin pager landed, switching poems broke once — the first article stayed, only the highlight changed. Caught by hand; decided not to hunt manually every time.
On board: npm install (once), npm test. Node 18+, built-in node:test, happy-dom for DOM in tests. node_modules/ is in .gitignore — git gets tests/, package.json, package-lock.json only.

What tests cover: isPagedEntry tells philosophy from poems; sectionBrowser replaces the article when you click the list; pageReader turns pages and reset() clears currentFile; Wheelhouse without pager does not stack old articles either.
What tests do not do: they do not open hidden doors, do not emulate touch/selection on the live site, do not run Home and Shore. This is an anchor under Cabin and pager — not the whole ocean.

Before push — npm test. If red — fix. If GitHub Pages deploy is red but build is green — often their infrastructure; the site lives on the previous version; an empty Retry Pages deploy commit sometimes helps.
